name: Duck Webs in Oyster Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the outer skin of the duck webs; wash and clean well.
2. Crush the ginger root and scallions.
3. Heat 2 tablespoons (30ml) oil in a pan; add the crushed ginger and scallions, then the duck webs. Stir occasionally.
4. Add rice wine or sherry and soy sauce. Cook for about 5 minutes.
5. Transfer the contents to a pot or casserole dish. Add sugar, a little salt, star anise, and some stock or water. Simmer gently for 3 hours.
6. Just before serving, stir-fry broccoli or greens with the dried mushrooms, a little salt, and sugar in a separate pan. Place them on a serving dish.
7. In another pan, heat oil, add oyster sauce and sesame seed oil. Mix cornstarch with cold water to make a smooth paste; stir into the saucepan. Pour over the duck webs and serve. The oyster sauce enhances the subtle flavor of the duck webs.
